notes: Horizon=12 bars (60 min). Re-run with --horizon 6 and --horizon 24 for MR and trend candidates.
CA-family candidates likely rediscover existing signals. Focus on [NEW] candidates.
Pre-commit to threshold before running any suggestion through the pipeline.
Run suggestions through standard WF+bootstrap gates — do not trust RF in-sample performance.

MULTI-FEATURE RULES: pair_rules_stable contains 2-feature conjunctions where RF found SHAP interaction between the pair AND quadrant analysis on test forward returns shows consistent directional edge across folds. These are stronger candidates than single-feature rules (H125-H133 lesson). Still validate with full WF+bootstrap.
